### C-1 / Sea Wolf submarine welding failure
- **canonical_cluster_id:** "C-1 / Sea Wolf submarine welding failure"
- **Anchor:** `§7.p4`
- **Quote (layer 3):** "This is a different mindset back then. Nowadays everybody wants to know how we can spend less money. Back then it was, how can we get the job done, who cares what it costs. Those were the big huge deficits — it was Ronald Reagan who taught the US government how to overspend, or taught the US government that you can buy votes with tax dollars by overspending. However you want to say it — I have some sympathy with the Tea Party idea that we shouldn't overspend everything we have. But they got the money, and Captain Firebaugh ended up designing a submarine. He ended up becoming Chief Engineer of..."
